title: City. Sydney.
description: Some random glimpse of Sydney city captured during the Melbourne to Sydney trip.

title: Campervan road trip - Melbourne to Sydney.
description: On the road - Melbourne to Sydney. Left some memories on the way. First timer in a campervan and it was a new skill unlocked!

title: Hitting the Great Ocean Road
description: Along the road, the view is just amazing. • Start the journey for the Great Ocean Road. • The Twelve Apostles, quite majestic view of the rock formations. • Tom and Eve at the Twelve Apostles. • The London Bridge, have you heard of the story? • Even the bushes along the road are beautiful. lol • More rocks. • And more...

title: City. Melbourne.
description: A short walk and a few photos of Melbourne city.
